'''Music Discs''' can be played in jukeboxes (similar to vanilla Minecraft).

'''(DTN 1.18.28 +),''' For now, most of the discs were removed, except for '''F. Chopin - Valse Du Petit Chien (DashieDev)''' as it still has an easter egg related to it. The dogs will be quite "hyperactve" when this disc is played.{{Item
| image = disc_chopin_op64_no1.png
| id = disc_chopin_op64_no1
| type = Discs
| stackable = 64
}}

== Obtaining ==
The items can be obtained by killing a hostile mob while [[Chopin Wig]] is equipped.

== Usage ==

* '''<code>Right-click</code>''' to use the disc on the Jukebox.
* '''<code>Right-click</code>''' again to eject the disc, and stop the music.

== Trivia ==
* It was introduced in DTN 1.18.30.
* The placeholder piece was performed by Musescore.
* Before DTN 1.18.28, there were a lot more music discs but...
